name: CiteGuard
description: Verifies a reference list against authoritative bibliographic APIs (Crossref, OpenAlex, PubMed). Flags retracted, fabricated/not-found, and metadata-mismatched citations, each anchored to a real record or an explicit 'not found'.

skills.name: Verify a bibliography
skills.description: Check every citation in a .bib, .ris, .docx, or pasted reference list against Crossref, OpenAlex, and PubMed. Returns a per-reference verdict (verified, retracted, not-found/possibly-fabricated, metadata-mismatch, or unverifiable grey literature) with the canonical record link and match confidence.
examples: Verify the references in my attached .bib file.
Check this reference list for retracted or fabricated citations.
Do all the DOIs in my manuscript's bibliography resolve to the right papers?
